features.title: Diagram Builders
features.description: Create flowcharts, architecture diagrams, networks, timelines, swimlanes, org charts, and generic graphs.

features.title: Stencils & Catalogs
features.description: Use generated catalogs, installed Visio stencils, or external .vssx and .vstx packs.

features.title: Connectors & Metadata
features.description: Connect shapes with labels, hyperlinks, Shape Data, waypoints, and routing hints.
